title: Israeli Strike Hits Displacement Tent Camp in Deir el-Balah
detail: Video circulated on March 25, 2026 showing an Israeli airstrike hitting a displacement tent camp in Deir el-Balah in central Gaza. The strike caused casualties among internally displaced Palestinians, many of whom fled there during earlier phases of the conflict. The incident prompted renewed international calls for full ceasefire compliance. The IDF did not immediately comment on the specific strike. Human rights organizations documented the incident as part of a broader pattern of continued Israeli strikes in Gaza during the nominal ceasefire period, which have killed over 673 Palestinians since the October 2025 ceasefire announcement.

title: US DOJ October 7 Terrorism Task Force Falters — Members Fired
detail: The Washington Post reported on March 25, 2026 that the US Department of Justice task force created to investigate Hamas terrorists responsible for kidnapping and murdering American citizens on October 7, 2023 has faltered. Multiple task force members were fired or reassigned following staffing changes at DOJ under Attorney General Pam Bondi. The task force was created with significant fanfare in early 2025 to prosecute those responsible for the deaths of 33 Americans on October 7. Critics argued the firings reflected broader DOJ dysfunction under the new administration. Victim families expressed dismay at the apparent collapse of accountability efforts.
